hero.description: Systems engineer from El Salvador 🇸🇻 who loves turning ideas into real software. I'm always learning and adapting to level up my solutions.

focusbear.title: Frontend Engineer Intern
focusbear.description: FocusBear is a productivity app focused on habit adherence and focus sessions, is specially useful for neurodivergent people that wants to keep their life in order.

arreglitosv.title: Frontend Engineer
arreglitosv.description: Arreglitosv is a web app where users can find top-notch flowers for every ocations, providing users a great experience with its responsive design.

echoes.title: Echoes - A real time chat app
echoes.description: A Whatsapp-like app with real time features, with Cloudinary integration to handle images uploading and Socket.io integrations to handle real-time comunication

blendz.title: Blendz - A language exchange app
blendz.description: An app where you can find friends and learn another language, with getStream intregration to handle chat and video calls features

aboutMe.p1: My name is Fernando Gómez. I'm a systems engineer who enjoys creating apps that make a difference, from small but powerful apps to Enterprise level apps, I'm all in.
aboutMe.p2: One of my success stories dates back to my time in college, when my friends and I created a mini-startup called SmartEnterprise. We collaborated with several local stores to improve their user experience and boost their sales.
aboutMe.p3: Through SmartEnterprise and other projects, I've gained extensive experience working in teams across a variety of applications, always striving to deliver top-quality results and be a strong team player.

meta.title: Portfolio FerDevCraft - Systems Engineer
meta.description: Hire FerDevCraft to make your app
